items.caption: A white sweatshirt with a graphic design on the front. the design features a black silhouette of a person standing with a speech bubble containing the text "and like a good neighbor...neighbor stay over there #socialdistancing2020". the background of the image is a gradient of purple and pink hues, with various logos and text elements scattered throughout. the logos include "mele", "hopshoptshirt.com", "made in the usa", "flashship", and "f5". the overall style of the image is promotional, likely intended for online retail or social media advertising.
